# Turing Wire — full content for LLM consumption

Generated: {{ site.time | date_to_xmlschema }}

This file is a flat-text export of Turing Wire's recent content, intended for ingestion by LLMs and retrieval systems. For the structured machine-readable graph, use `/knowledge-graph.json`.

---

## STORIES (multi-source verifiable synthesis)

{% for story in site.stories %}
### {{ story.title }}

URL: {{ site.url }}{{ story.url }}
First seen: {{ story.first_seen | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
Last updated: {{ story.last_updated | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
Trust score: {{ story.trust_score | times: 100 | round }}%
Companies: {{ story.companies | join: ", " }}
Sources: {{ story.sources.size }} · Claims: {{ story.claims.size }}

Lead: {{ story.lead }}

Claims:
{% for c in story.claims %}- [{{ c.status }}] (conf {{ c.confidence | times: 100 | round }}%) {{ c.text }}{% if c.note %} — Note: {{ c.note }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

Sources:
{% for s in story.sources %}- {{ s.publisher }} — {{ s.title }} ({{ s.url }})
{% endfor %}

Editorial synthesis:
{{ story.content | strip_html }}

---

{% endfor %}

## RECENT ARTICLES

{% assign recent = site.posts | slice: 0, 100 %}
{% for post in recent %}
### {{ post.title }}

URL: {{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}
Published: {{ post.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}
Impact: {{ post.impact }} · Category: {{ post.subcategory }}
Company: {{ post.company }}{% if post.secondary_companies.size > 0 %} (also: {{ post.secondary_companies | join: ", " }}){% endif %}
Original source: {{ post.source_publisher }} — {{ post.source_url }}

{{ post.content | strip_html | truncate: 1500 }}

{% endfor %}
